title: Embedding Vector
description: Output from embedding generation including vectors, chunk metadata, and model information
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries the result of running an embedding model over one or more chunks of text. Each result entry pairs a chunk (text, offsets, index) with its dense floating-point vector, allowing downstream consumers to build indexes, compute similarity, or store vectors without re-running the model.

## When to use
Use this type as the output of any embedding cap. Consumers expecting a list of pre-computed vectors from a single document or batch should accept this type. For multi-document batches see [Embedding Vector List](https://capdag.com/browse/media:embedding-vector;list;record;textable).

## Notes
The `embedding_dim` field on the top-level object must match the length of every `embedding` array in `results`. Implementers should validate this invariant. The `start_offset` and `end_offset` fields are byte offsets into the original source document and can be used to reconstruct which portion of a document each vector covers.

chunk.description: The document chunk this embedding is for

chunk_index.description: Index of this chunk in the document

start_offset.description: Start byte offset in original document

end_offset.description: End byte offset in original document
